title: USBG Plant
description: A plant specimen in the United States Botanic Garden Living Collections database.

accessionNumber.description: Unique accession identifier assigned when the plant was acquired

scientificName.description: Full scientific name including genus, species, and any infraspecific epithet

nativeRange.description: Geographic region where the plant naturally occurs

location.description: Physical location within the USBG where the plant is maintained

source.description: Original source from which the plant was acquired

quantity.description: Number of individual plants in this accession

conservationStatus.description: Conservation status (e.g., Endangered, Threatened, Least Concern)

tags.description: Classification tags for the plant specimen
